articles.title: Lorne Gunter: Canada energy exports still crippled by lost Liberal decade
articles.description: Last month, federal Energy Minister Tim Hodgson told the House of Commons natural resources committee that Canada could become “one of the largest suppliers of LNG in the world.” We already should be. Granted, Hodgson made his observation before U.S. President Donald Trump started his war with Iran.
